label: Pawn capacity modifier
description: Adjusts a specific pawn capacity (e.g. Moving, Consciousness) by offset, factor, or hard cap.

offset.label: Offset
offset.description: Flat value added to the capacity after other calculations.

setMax.label: Set max
setMax.description: Hard cap applied to the capacity. The capacity cannot exceed this value. 999 means effectively uncapped.

postFactor.label: Post factor
postFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the capacity after offset and cap calculations.

statFactorMod.label: Stat factor mod
statFactorMod.description: StatDef whose value is used as an additional multiplier on this capacity modifier.

setMaxCurveOverride.label: Set max curve override
setMaxCurveOverride.description: Curve used to evaluate the hard cap dynamically. Requires setMaxCurveEvaluateStat to determine the input value.

setMaxCurveEvaluateStat.label: Set max curve evaluate stat
setMaxCurveEvaluateStat.description: StatDef whose value is fed into setMaxCurveOverride to determine the hard cap at runtime.
